untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'earnings surprise (actual vs. consensus deviation > 1%)' which is not available in the allowed indicators list. Earnings data, consensus estimates, and surprise calculations are external fundamental data not present in the price/volume/technical indicator universe provided.
translation_notes: Translated price and volume conditions using available indicators: daily return (returns > 0.0025 ≈ 0.25% gain), volume ratio (vol_ratio_20 > 1.1), and close position in range (body_pct > 0.4 approximates close in top 40% of range). The critical earnings surprise condition cannot be expressed without access to earnings announcement data and consensus estimates. This signal is fundamentally dependent on event-driven data not supported by the technical indicator set.
